title: Perform a left-to-right arithmetic reduction on a list of numbers
summary: Perform a left-to-right arithmetic reduction across a list of numbers. The first operand is the seed; each subsequent operand is applied via the chosen operation against the running total. Writes result.json and run.log to output_dir.
description:
Reduces an array of numbers using a single arithmetic operation applied left-to-right. The first element of `operands` acts as the initial accumulator; each subsequent element is applied via the chosen `operation` against the running total. For example, `subtract` on `[10, 3, 2]` produces `10 - 3 - 2 = 5`.

This command is a minimal reference implementation demonstrating the plugin protocol — it is intentionally simple to serve as a testable baseline.

arguments.name: operation
arguments.description: The arithmetic operation to apply: add (+), subtract (−), multiply (×), or divide (÷). Applied uniformly to all operands in a left-to-right reduction.

arguments.name: operands
arguments.description: Array of numbers to reduce. Must contain at least one element. For divide, no non-first operand may be zero.

arguments.name: output_dir
arguments.description: Directory where result.json and run.log are written. Created if it does not exist.

details:
`calculate` applies one arithmetic operation left-to-right across `operands`:

- **add**: `a + b + c + ...`
- **subtract**: `a - b - c - ...`
- **multiply**: `a × b × c × ...`
- **divide**: `a ÷ b ÷ c + ...` (errors if any non-first operand is zero)

The result is written to `result.json` as `{ "result": <value> }`. A run.log is also written summarising the operation.

This plugin exists to test the plugin protocol end-to-end without requiring any model or estimation logic.
value:
On success, `output_dir` contains:

- `result.json` — `{ "result": <computed_value> }`.
- `run.log` — a log of the operation performed.

The plugin emits `event.run.started` then `event.run.finished` (or `event.run.failed` on divide-by-zero).
notes: Divide-by-zero on any non-first operand produces event.run.failed.
A single-element operands array returns that element unchanged.
This plugin is a protocol reference implementation — it is not intended for production analytical use.

fields.name: operation
fields.description: Arithmetic operation: add, subtract, multiply, or divide.

fields.name: operands
fields.description: Array of numbers to reduce left-to-right. At least one element required.

artifacts.title: Run log
artifacts.description: A brief summary of the operation performed.
